programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Drum Taps 1933
programme.desc: In Drum Taps, cowboy star Ken Maynard rides into action when a vicious gang threatens to overrun the frontier. With his trusty horse Tarzan at his side, he rallies ranchers and townsfolk alike to stand against lawlessness. Packed with galloping chases, blazing six-guns, and Maynard’s trademark heroics, this early sound Western delivers classic thrills straight from the saddle.

programme.title: Roll On Texas Moon 1946
programme.desc: Roy Rogers rides tall in Roll On Texas Moon, a Western packed with action, music, and romance. When a bitter feud erupts between cattlemen and sheep ranchers, Roy steps in to prevent bloodshed and uncover the schemers fueling the conflict. With Dale Evans, George ‘Gabby’ Hayes, and the Sons of the Pioneers along for the ride, the film blends fast-paced adventure, trail songs, and Texas charm into a classic Roy Rogers showdown.

programme.title: Great Lakes extremes; storm recaps in the Midwest
programme.desc: Three Midwest meteorologists break down an incredibly intense two-week weather pattern. From 20+ tornadoes tracking near Chicago to dramatic water rescues in Detroit and a massive flash-flood-to-tornado sequence in Wisconsin, the team explains the real human impacts—and why "average" seasonal forecasting is rarely what it seems.
